summary: V56.2 Mobile Performance Fix - All tests pass. Backend 9/9 APIs working. Frontend mobile pages load cleanly without glitching. Guided Tour navigates between rooms correctly.

issues: Bundle size warning: 1.71MB exceeds 1MB threshold for fast mobile loading (pre-existing issue)

critical_code_review_comments: V56.2 mobile performance fixes verified in code: (1) SpatialRouter.js has no 3D transforms (rotateY, translateZ, blur, preserve-3d) in page transitions, (2) Mobile uses simpler scale+opacity transitions (0.97 scale, 0.25s duration), (3) SpatialRoom.js particle count capped at 8 on mobile, (4) Scene images disabled on mobile (window.innerWidth >= 768 check), (5) CinematicWalkthrough completely rewritten as Guided Tour with actual navigation via useNavigate()
context_for_next_testing_agent: V56.2 mobile performance fixes verified: (1) Hub page loads cleanly on mobile 390x844, (2) Crystals page shows discovery grid with crystal cards, (3) Teachings page shows 12 teacher cards, (4) Oracle page shows I Ching tab with Tarot/Astrology/Chinese Astrology/Sacred Geometry tabs, (5) Meditation page loads with guided meditations and timer mode, (6) Guided Tour button works - shows 4 tour options (Wellness Journey, Oracle Path, Earth Medicine, Grand Tour) and clicking Wellness Journey navigates to /breathing page (actual navigation, not page rotation). Explore and Cinematic Mode buttons are present and clickable on Crystals page. All core backend APIs working (crystals 12, herbology 12, yoga 7 styles, oracle zodiac 12, rpg status, teachings teachers, frequencies, sovereign status).
